description: Immutable official Colombia scopes used by RuleSpec-CO: the COLMOD v6.0 tranche-1 statute chain (Ley 100 de 1993; Ley 2010 de 2019 with the operative UVT-banded PIT schedule; Ley 1532 de 2012 Familias en Accion) and the Ingreso Solidario creation decree (DL 518 de 2020). First Colombia cut; SOUTHMOD full-bundle program lane 4.
